ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ipl_seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., IPL20) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors for the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches scheduled for the season */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Home, Away, Tie, No Result) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Group Stage, Playoff, Final) */,
  "man_of_the_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the man of the match award */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., Bat, Field) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES ipl_seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_ground_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., Right-hand bat, Left-hand bat) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., Right-arm fast, Left-arm spin) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_highlights" TEXT /* Text field for career highlights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event belongs to */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the event in the match */,
  "eventid" INTEGER /* Event ID (unique per match) */,
  "innings" TEXT /* Innings of the event (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target score for the innings */,
  "remaining_balls" INTEGER /* Remaining balls in the innings */,
  "home_score" TEXT /* Home team's score (wickets/overs) */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team's score */,
  "fallof_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets fallen */,
  "ball_number" INTEGER /* Ball number in the over */,
  "over" REAL /* Over number */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Score value of the ball */,
  "valid_ball" INTEGER /* Whether the ball is valid */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Extras (if any) */,
  "dismissal" INTEGER /* Whether there was a dismissal */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., caught, bowled) */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "other_athlete_involved_id" INTEGER /* ID of the other athlete involved in the event (if any) */,
  "non_striker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-striker */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the ball */,
  "run_rate" REAL /* Run rate of the innings */,
  "over_bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler for the over */,
  "over_batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman for the over */,
  "over_non_striker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-striker for the over */,
  "umpire_decision" TEXT /* Umpire's decision (e.g., LBW, Not Out) */,
  "field_placement" TEXT /* Placement of fielders (text description) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_over_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("over_batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_over_non_striker_id FOREIGN KEY ("over_non_striker_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_over_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("over_bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_other_athlete_involved_id FOREIGN KEY ("other_athlete_involved_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_non_striker_id FOREIGN KEY ("non_striker_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "innings_played" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a single innings */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance (wickets/overs) */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate (runs/balls) */,
  "average" REAL /* Average (runs/wickets) */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate (runs/overs) */,
  "highest_score_details" TEXT /* Details of the highest score (e.g., match ID, opponent team) */,
  "best_bowling_details" TEXT /* Details of the best bowling performance (e.g., match ID, opponent team) */,
  "career_high_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in the player's career */,
  "career_best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance in the player's career */,
  "career_strike_rate" REAL /* Career strike rate */,
  "career_average" REAL /* Career average */,
  "career_economy_rate" REAL /* Career economy rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "tied_matches" INTEGER /* Number of tied matches */,
  "no_results" INTEGER /* Number of matches with no result */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "net_run_rate" REAL /* Net run rate */,
  "highest_total_score" INTEGER /* Highest total score in a single match */,
  "best_bowling_performance" TEXT /* Best bowling performance (e.g., wickets/overs) */,
  "best_batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best batsman in the team */,
  "best_bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best bowler in the team */,
  "home_ground_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins at the home ground */,
  "away_ground_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins away from the home ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access (e.g., page accessed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "is_captain" INTEGER /* Whether the player is the captain */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position_in_field" TEXT /* Position in the field (e.g., Wicket-keeper, Slip) */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player */,
  "bowling_order" INTEGER /* Bowling order of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id", "player_id")
)
